3309850.name: The Gold Maker : Rendez-vous with Death
3309850.description:
WISHLIST US :O

  • All assets, screenshots, and trailers are from an early development build and do not represent the final game. Expect major evolutions as we iterate!

All is well in the small mountain town of Metra, far away from the woes of the world.

But the shadow of war is crawling closer and darkness looms ahead.

Teneb and Aora, the only hope for humanity, fight to free the world from its demons.  

Follow their story in The Gold Maker : Rendez-vous with Death, a 3D fantasy RPG created by StudioTraexid featuring:

- rewarding loot,

- a fascinating quest,

- smooth dialogues, and

- original turn-based combats against playful animals, terrible people and terrifying creatures.

NO AI, 100% HUMAN
